steps.title: Identify the key signal for accomplishment
steps.content: An accomplishment requires showing what the NCAI achieved. The one note that demonstrates this is: “The advocacy of the NCAI was a key factor in the law's passing.” All other notes merely describe founding details.

steps.title: Match the accomplishment signal to the choices
steps.content:
C uses this signal effectively: the NCAI's advocacy was instrumental in passing Public Law 96-638, legislation formally recognizing tribal self-governance.

Those choices offer only founding details, while D misrepresents the facts by attributing the law's passage to the NCAI instead of Congress.

That confirms C is correct.
